dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: SpaceX 600th Landing Milestone — GPS III SV-10 'Hedy Lamarr' Targeting Apr 21; IFT-12 in May
heroSubtitle: 8,751 days of reusability milestones — 600th Falcon booster landing achieved Apr 19 (B1097/OCISLY, Starlink 17-22); 48 orbital launches in 2026; GPS III SV-10 'Hedy Lamarr' scrubbed Apr 20, targeting Apr 21 as the 49th launch and final GPS III constellation satellite; Booster 19 + Ship 39 cleared for IFT-12 stacking (May 2026 target); SpaceX IPO S-1 process ongoing for June 2026 Nasdaq debut
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Inside GNSS, Northrop Grumman
